p3.title: Claude review output format was noncompliant
p3.description: Claude CLI completed successfully with zero permission denials but returned function-call planning text instead of the requested strict verdict JSON. The raw result is preserved; no actionable P0/P1/P2 finding was returned.
p3.impact: Evidence quality issue only; CP00-059 closeout is additionally gated by focused tests, RP00 validation, closeout-pack validation, and final product validators.
p3.recommendation: Do not run a second Claude review for this pack; preserve the one-review policy and adjudicate the format defect as nonblocking.
p3.defer_reason: One-review policy preserved; final local/Hermes validators independently enforce CP00-059 boundaries.

boundary_checks.plan_binding: pass - CP00-059 Risk B 26-unit plan binding is enforced across contract, policy, module, fixture, README, tests, and validator checks.
boundary_checks.source_micro_phase_completion: pass - RP00.P04.M02, M03, and M04 are marked completed while RP00.P04 remains open to M05.
boundary_checks.tenant_fail_closed: pass - same-tenant synthetic metadata is required and cross-tenant matter metadata returns blocked refs without production-completion flags.
boundary_checks.no_runtime_ui_render: pass - runtime_ui_render_permitted=false and render claims are rejected.
boundary_checks.no_external_asset_fetch: pass - external_asset_fetch_permitted=false and asset/fetch claims are rejected.
boundary_checks.no_review_queue_or_assignment_write: pass - review_queue_write, assignment, and notification flags are false and unsafe claims are rejected.
boundary_checks.no_permission_engine_authz_security_trim: pass - permission engine, AuthZ evaluator, and security trimming execution are forbidden in this metadata-only pack.
boundary_checks.no_database_storage_idempotency_lock_aud: pass - all persistence/write flags are false.
boundary_checks.upstream_evidence_binding: pass - CP00-058 evidence refs are required by policy and request.

notes: Claude CLI execution succeeded with zero permission denials and exactly one pack-level invocation, but the result text did not return the requested verdict/findings object.

The incomplete review format is preserved as evidence and adjudicated as nonblocking because it returned no actionable P0/P1/P2 findings, and local focused validation plus RP00 validator coverage independently bind the pack.
No additional Claude review was run for CP00-059 to preserve the one-review policy.
parsed_review.raw_result_excerpt:
